name: PDF Expert
description: Professional PDF editor for macOS. Supports editing text, images, and links; filling forms; signing documents; annotating; OCR; and merging/splitting PDFs.

sparkle.note: UNCERTAIN: Likely uses Sparkle (SUFeedURL in app bundle), but the exact appcast URL is not publicly documented. The app bundle's SUFeedURL should be consulted.

scrape.note: UNCERTAIN: May be able to extract version from the zip's Info.plist or from the download server headers (e.g., Last-Modified, Content-Disposition)

release_date.note: UNCERTAIN: No confirmed machine-readable release date source. The what's-new page may include dates. The Sparkle appcast (if accessible) would provide pubDate.

notes: Paid app from Readdle. Also available on the Mac App Store. UNCERTAINTY: Sparkle usage is likely but not confirmed — the exact Sparkle feed URL is not publicly documented. The direct download zip URL is for PDF Expert 3 (pem3 path component). Version detection without access to the Sparkle feed may require scraping or manual checking.
